projectDescription: A browser-based game engine for creating 2D/3D games with visual scripting, Web3 integration, and social platform publishing.
keyFeatures: Browser-based 3D/2D game editor with Three.js and React Three Fiber
Visual scripting system with blueprint-style nodes (events, actions, logic, math, Web3)
Solana Web3 integration with Pump.fun token trading and NFT minting
Token gating and in-game economy features
One-click publishing to Twitter Player Cards, Telegram Mini Apps, and web embeds
Scene serialization and export to JSON
Transform controls (translate, rotate, scale) with keyboard shortcuts
publicApiSurface: useEditorStore - Zustand store for scene management (addObject, removeObject, updateTransform, exportScene)
useWeb3Store - Zustand store for Web3 features (tokens, NFTs, economy, transactions)
SceneObject - Core 3D object type (box, sphere, cylinder, plane, cone, torus, lights, camera)
Visual Scripting Nodes - Event nodes (Begin Play, Tick, Key Press, Collision, Click)
Visual Scripting Nodes - Action nodes (Move To, Rotate, Spawn, Destroy, Play Sound, Set Visible)
Visual Scripting Nodes - Logic nodes (Branch, Sequence, Delay, For Loop)
Visual Scripting Nodes - Math nodes (Add, Multiply, Compare, Random)
Visual Scripting Nodes - Web3 nodes (Launch Token, Buy/Sell Token, Mint NFT, Token Gate, Check Balance, Airdrop, Send SOL, Reward Player)
Viewport component - 3D canvas with OrbitControls, TransformControls, Grid, lighting
NodeEditor component - React Flow based visual scripting interface
Web3Panel component - Token/NFT management, economy settings, wallet integration
